programmes.show_description: Romance with Lacey Chabert. Brian and Jenny are now engaged and preparing for the opening of their bed and breakfast, but a major storm threatens to dampen their plans. (2017)
Jonathan reunites a dying woman with her son after she was forced to leave him behind in the Soviet Union during World War II. The son, however, believes Jonathan is working for the CIA.
